understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid while avoiding spike tiles (landing on spikes ends the run). Each level must be completed within the turn budget (50 turns per attempt, 2 attempts per level).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; after each horizontal move, the character automatically falls in the current gravity direction (here consistently DOWN, toward lower y-values) until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x tiles) at target positions to clear fall paths, without advancing the player. Gravity direction determines fall trajectory after horizontal moves. UNDO can revert the previous action for recovery. Steps decrement with every action, and landing on spikes or exhausting steps causes failure.
